text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... The gap... between my friend and I... I closed it a little...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But I couldn't catch up to her...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And Special Week... was a tougher opponent than
I thought she'd be...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... Whew! I gave that run my all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And that, Cafe, was a taste of Hokkaido's bounties! The more you eat and run, the tougher you get!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The more you eat and run... So you don't just eat,
you burn it all for energy...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So that's how Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Manhattan Cafe's picked up on
something that'll stay with her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: About our next goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Theoretically, advancing to the Takarazuka
Kinen—the spring Grand Prix—would be the
standard route to take.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she doesn't look well, and I'm concerned
about her nails, too. We might have to prioritize
rest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I sense a silent pressure. It's as if she's saying... rest isn't an option...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let's play it safe. Deciding to have
her rest in the summer, I say...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a second I think I'm hearing things.
Manhattan Cafe's voice just now... It sounded like
someone else's...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can say no, but the Takarazuka Kinen is the
most ambitious option we've got this spring. Just
what does she have in mind?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I won't reach her... Not that way. If I'm going to
get faster and stronger, we must go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She moves calmly, like a spirit. But when she
points, the direction is precise.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Away... Overseas, to France...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's where my friend is going... alone... So I
must...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh. Overseas, is it? I see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That imaginary friend of yours has no physical
body. I suppose she doesn't need to worry about
the laws of physics.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Should we try and establish a dialogue?
"Hello, we're calling in from the third dimension."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you trying to destroy your host's body? Or
are your actions fueled by your belief in her?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...I can't get through. Unless perhaps she has no
desire to communicate with us?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... you'll make my wish come true, won't
you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My friend is telling me to come to her. I can't
ignore her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An international race in France... You could
definitely say that was a more ambitious option
than the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And there's a certain race in France that all
Umamusume dream of winning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking Manhattan Cafe's condition into account,
the odds are against us. But this is her dream. And
most importantly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promised that we would chase after her friend.
And that's a promise I mean to keep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe smiles in response, while Agnes
Tachyon offers a very slight shrug.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I almost forgot to say. Keep this between us,
but I'm really not a fan of airplanes!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm... not asking you to come with us.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But my trainer and I have to go. That's why we...
signed our contract.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I was just letting you know. Don't pay it
any mind. That said...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Craziness... has always been my specialty, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We settle on a plan. But since Manhattan Cafe's
reaction to the spring Tenno Sho is still
concerning me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep our options open, leaving Takarazuka
Kinen as a second choice. I'll make my final
decision next month.
